description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a large, wraparound terrace on the upper level, featuring multiple outdoor seating areas with tables and chairs. The building is primarily white with brown railings and trim, and it has a flat roof with a small rooftop structure. The front of the house includes a covered entryway supported by columns, leading to a paved driveway and parking area with several parked cars. There is a small green lawn section at the rear and a blossoming tree near the parking lot, adding a touch of landscaping. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large arched windows on the ground floor and rectangular ones above. The overall design is modern with Mediterranean influences, emphasizing outdoor living spaces and clean lines.
description: A modern two-story white house with a large terrace, flat roof, and a prominent front entryway, surrounded by a driveway, parking area, and landscaping.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial front of the house, highlighting the terrace, outdoor seating, and the adjacent parking area with cars.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the green lawn section and the full extent of the upper terrace, with less visibility of the parking area.
description_view_2: This angle displays the opposite side of the house, terrace, and a clear view of the parking lot and blossoming tree.
description_view_3: The direct front view emphasizes the main entryway, driveway, and the symmetrical arrangement of cars and landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, steps, and a prominent front door
